caption_std:
Coming in hot with some of my favourite single leg exercises I do to target the glutes. Due to previous knee injuries I have strength imbalances between my left and right. Which is soooo annoying, especially with running. So when I’m in the gym I try to focus on single leg movements to promote muscle growth, strength and to challenge my stabilisers too. 

The burn is real with these and all you need is a KB / DB and a box! Give it a go and let me know your feedback! 💪🏼 💪🏼 

Superset 1: 8-10 reps each side 
- Bulgarian split squat straight into single leg RDL (this is one rep)

Once you have done both sides move into: 
- Step ups (lean fwd for glute bias) x 10-12 each side 

*

Wearing @lululemonausnz 

#gluteactivation #singlelegtraining #injuryrehab #lowerbodyworkout #weightedpilates #dumbbellworkout #stepups #bulgariansplitsquats #glutebias #gymworkoutsforwomen #lululemonleggings

caption_std:
Before I give you the 6 posing tips…I just want to remind you that social media is NOT real. Stop comparing your real self to the fake crap you see on here. Deal?! Now here’s the 6 posing tips: 

1. Wear high waisted compression pants. Game changer! Honestly, mine are from @lululemon and I’ve had them for over 3 years. 
2. I tapped my tatas together. 😳 You read that right! With packing tape! 🤣 It did not feel great ripping it off. 
3. I used a filter to look tan because I’m very pale right now. Tan skin looks more toned. 
4. Camera angle is EVERYTHING! Notice how low the camera is in the “before” and how high the camera is in the “after.” 
5. I put my hand on the smallest part of my waist. 
6. I held my breath! Seriously, don’t breathe. Do flex. 
7. Bonus Tip! For a dramatic “before & after” look like a bridge troll in the before. Then, get ready, hair, makeup, the works and take the after. 

Try these 7 posing tips or don’t! Just remember, what you see on social media is NOT real. Influencers use posing techniques all the time to improve their photo & video content. #posingtips #posingforthecamera #realvsfake #momsover30 #momofthreekids #lululemonleggings #highwaistedleggings

✨ someone within this community

caption_std:
What’s the best split?

Maybe you have a chest day, back day, leg day, shoulder day, an arm day, or even… an ab day.

Or maybe you do push/pull/legs ; chest/shoulder/tris - back & bis - legs.

But for whatever reason, you feel like the program is hard to follow, or wonder if your results could be better.

Answer: There isn’t a best split.

Even if a split COULD be better on paper, if it isn’t sustainable, it isn’t for you.

The best split for you would change depending on your lifestyle and goals as well.

Having someone guide your training can really make a difference in enjoyment, sustainability, accountability, and progress, all individualized for you.

Your weekly split usually will determine your training frequency, which is just as important of a variable as exercise selection, sets, and reps.

Don’t let what is popular or someone else’s programming preferences slow down your own potential.

If you’re having trouble coming up with enjoyable, sustainable routine that fits your lifestyle and goals, DM  me “Bro” and let’s see how we can start making some changes.

caption_clean: What’s the best split? Maybe you have a chest day, back day, leg day, shoulder day, an arm day, or even… an ab day. Or maybe you do push/pull/legs ; chest/shoulder/tris - back & bis - legs. But for whatever reason, you feel like the program is hard to follow, or wonder if your results could be better. Answer: There isn’t a best split. Even if a split COULD be better on paper, if it isn’t sustainable, it isn’t for you. The best split for you would change depending on your lifestyle and goals as well. Having someone guide your training can really make a difference in enjoyment, sustainability, accountability, and progress, all individualized for you. Your weekly split usually will determine your training frequency, which is just as important of a variable as exercise selection, sets, and reps. Don’t let what is popular or someone else’s programming preferences slow down your own potential. If you’re having trouble coming up with enjoyable, sustainable routine that fits your lifestyle and goals, DM me “Bro” and let’s see how we can start making some changes.

caption_std:
Today I did my first ever @ultraxco trail run with @thefoodmedic & @jonnyrdavies 

25km of hills, trails and mud taking almost 3hours to complete. 

Going in I thought it would be similar to road running pace but the terrain makes it much harder and thus adding about an hour to the completion time. 

I really enjoyed it and found that the off road terrain and environment really engaged my brain more and I found it much less monotonous than road running. 

For sure I’ll be doing another.

The @nikerunning @goretexeu trail shows were excellent!
I wore @lululemoneurope legging shorts and loved the fit and feel. Very supportive and comfy 👍🏼
Sunnies from @we_are_sungod always keeping my eyes protected. 

Who else prefers trails to roads?
Any other good events coming up I should do?

#ultraxperience #ultrax #running #trailrunning #thefoodmedic #jdrunsfar #davidbirtwistle #nikerunning #lululemonleggings #sungod #sungodsunglasses

caption_std:
$25 Amazon yoga pants vs. $98 Lululemon Align pant! Sharing my thoughts below. 👇🏻 I LOVE the align pant, but so many of you have raved about the Amazon ones so I had to compare! 🎀TO SHOP: Click the link in my profile above and tap “⭐️Shop my Instagram posts.” (Commissionable link)

⭐️Shape & Support: $25 ones were more flattering (especially in the back! 😅 and thigh area) and seemed to lift and support more than $98.
⭐️Material: $25 slight thicker than $98. Material was great on less expensive option. I was surprised by that.
⭐️Comfort: $98 wins that for me, however, I am used to wearing aligns. The $25 were very comfortable too, but the align wins that for me.
⭐️$98 come up higher (which I like) and the band is wider as well. $25 didn’t come up as high, but I am 5’8. I know not everyone likes high rise. I would describe the $25 as more of a mid-rise. 
⭐️$25 has more seams and does have pockets. 

⭐️Overall, the $25 are a really great option, and definitely the best inexpensive athletic pants I have come across, so I definitely understand the hype on these! 

#amazonfashion#lookforless#founditonamazon #amazonfashionfinds#momfashionblogger#amazondeals#amazonfinds#lululemonleggings#looksforless#amazonlooksforless#momstyle#momfashion#everydayoutfit

caption_std:
昨天真的是冷歪
拍攝完我其實又套了一件外套，整個人穿成像米其林(今天也是🤣
怎麼感覺台北的10度跟名古屋的10度內有的拼
穿短褲不是我不冷，是上班穿短褲我覺得比較方便+沒找到好看但上班可以穿的褲子，只好先犧牲我的小腿了

上衣：Graphpaper L/S Mock Neck Tee
外套：beams
背心：Audience60/40 Sorona
下身：Lulu lemon 
鞋子：Nike super airfly
帽子：Reception
手套：Montbell 

手套是當時在日本實在太冷，臨時購入的。一開始是在Graphpaper 看到類似款，覺得蠻好看的，但想說不要一開始就狂花錢，畢竟有9天行程啊！後來第二天晚上覺得不行，必須入一副手套，不然應該會被凍到截肢。最後就買了這副手套，可以伸出五指手指頭滑手機🤣，看起來很完美～但實際上是根本不想伸出手指頭，太冷了～

這幾天持續降溫，注意保暖啊各位！

#ootd #graphpaper #lululemon

caption_std:
Happy Flex Friday beauties!!😍

Give this total body band workout a try!!💪🏼

Exercise Tips➡️When using the band, make sure you have tension the entire time you are going through each exercise.  ALSO, focus on making that mind muscle connection 🧠💪🏼, and really squeeze the muscle group you are working to activate it properly!

1️⃣Superset
Overhead Wide Grip Pull Down 12x
Low Row 12x
—3x

2️⃣Superset
Chest Press 12x
Chest Fly 12x
—3x

3️⃣Triplex
Bicep Curls
Shoulder Front Raise
1 Arm Tricep Extension
—3x

4️⃣Core Finish Superset
Band Plank Hold 30 seconds
Band Rotations 30x Alternating
—3x

Triplex➡️Complete 3 exercises back to back without a break.  Once you go through the 3 exercises, break for 30-60 seconds before going through again.

Superset➡️Complete 2 exercises back to back without a break.  Once you go through the 3 exercises, break for 30-60 seconds before going through again.

Give this one a go and let me know what you think!!💃🏼🤙🏼

What workout would you like to see next?!♿️

caption_std:
“But my doctor said I need to stop lifting”

No. Fuck that.

Let me just tell you I’ve been told the same thing over 10 years ago when I hurt my back, deadlifting, herniating a  disc. I was a complete noob to the gym at the time.

But when there’s a will, there’s a way. This injury changed my life for the better. It’s why I became a physical therapist, why I became obsessed with strength training, and what lead me to become a competitive powerlifter.

Now my mission is to help clear out all the bullshit and help others do what they really want to do, get strong, gain confidence, and feel badass.

This is for everyone who’s been made felt like they were not good enough to lift for whatever reason. 

Let me be the prime example of someone who returned from back injury and am literally stronger than I’d ever though I’d be back then.

The barbell is here to enhance your life, not take away from it. It has given me so much, I wouldn’t be who I am today without it. I’m here to pay it back to the community.

DM me “LFG” to get started.

caption_std:
Wasn’t expecting myself to jump on the HYROX hype.

Started off just trying to be consistent again. Signed up for ClassPass, found @afterburnkl.fit … and slowly fell in love with the grind.

A few months in, I saw @morph.kl looking for a coach for their new KLGCC outlet — took the leap, went for it.
Grateful to @morph.kl and @arifulmy for the opportunity 🙏

Race day? Honestly, I was stressed. I knew my prep wasn’t perfect. But it was the best I could do while juggling life — husband, father, coach, personal trainer… and just being me.

Training during Ramadhan, especially in the day, isn’t easy — but when there’s no choice, you just make it work.

This journey taught me a lot. Discipline, sacrifice, and showing up even when you don’t feel ready.

And of course… biggest thank you to my wife for holding it down through everything ❤️ @mingisntme #lululemon #thesweatlife #hyrox #hyroxtha

MY LULULEMON FAVOURITES 🤍🍋 + what I think is worth your money 🙌🏼 (hold down screen to pause) @lululemon 
.
The align leggings 🥰😍 everyone’s go to softest pair of leggings! I’ve been obsessed for YEARS, it’s like your wearing nothing 👌🏻smooth as butter! They are best for everyday wear & can be worn for exercise but nothing too intense. I save the Wunder Under’s for anything intense 🙌🏼
.
Free to be wild high neck sports bra, I have been OBSESSED with this bra for months! Perfect for spin & high impact training plus it’s so cute 🥰
.
Free to be wild sports bra, another long time FAV of mine, definitely great if you are smaller chested like me 😅 perfect for training + VERY comfortable and cute (I wear them pretty much everyday)
.
On the fly joggers, the comfiest pants I have ever owned to be honest 😂🙌🏼 I didn’t think I could ever love a pair of pants so much! Perfect for everyday wear + working out as well!
.
Swiftly tech racerback tank, such a great staple....I’m currently on my way to order every other colour because they are PERFECT for every type of workout & very sweat wicking! They also come in short sleeve & long sleeve 👌🏻
.
Sculpt Tank Cropped, these have been my favourite tank for every type of training + they are very sweat wicking and stretchy 👏🏻 I personally love that they are high necked for teaching spin!
.
The Align Short 6”, everyone’s obsession for these shorts is definitely understandable 😍👏🏻 it’s like wearing butter, so soft & they hug you in so perfectly 👌🏻
.
The Energy Bra, this style of sports bra was actually the first one I ever bought from lululemon, the perfect basic bra that everyone needs for training + everyday wear. These are a bit higher support than the free to be wild bras which is great for higher impact workouts 👌🏻 plus they come in a million different colours
.
Held Tight Tank, such a cute cropped tank which can be dressed up or down 🙌🏼 so comfy too and I love that it has an open back
.
The Define Jacket, such a great staple jacket to thrown on top of any outfit! They are extremely flattering!
.

caption_std:
Friendly Reminder ✨
It’s okay to be a beginner and own it . You can also re-start as many times needed . The only thing that matters is that you keep moving forward . No one starts at the top ❗️

Day 2/7 of our @latinasrunning running man challenge . 
Walk/Run 1-2 miles and jump-rope or do modified jumping jacks if you can’t for a minute . Tag #latinasrunning and join us . 

My first mile in awhile outdoors , first time doing burpees in years ( yes my form sucks, I will get better ) , and giving myself some grace on this Tuesday to get some movment in= instead of powering and working non-stop . 

Only had 30 minutes , but gave it my all ! 💪🏾🔥 I’m back 😎

***** I really need better sports bras and headphones that won’t fall off . These AirPods aren’t cutting it 😩. 

One more reminder ❗️ if you see people working out with not the best form = you are not entitled to give advice If you’re not their physical therapist/chiropractor /Doctor /Trainer .  For some it maybe it’s day 1 of their journey ; for some ; that looks better than day 1 . 

Give them a 👏🏽 or keep it moving .

caption_std:
I always thought I was more of a beach lady... but I think I’m meant to be in the mountains. My mind was blown literally every time I looked out of the window of the cabin we were staying in or drove anywhere. ⠀
The mountains are HUGE, and I couldn’t help but feel overwhelmed with amazement and appreciation for this planet. ⠀
⠀
I went on two gorgeous 5-ish mile hikes that were some of my favorite hikes ever and Sam and I spent a day mountain biking at Sundance which will be a highlight of any trip for a long time! ⠀
Yes, I ate it twice and messed myself up (you saw the damage if you watch my stories 🤦‍♀️) but it was soooo worth it and I can’t wait to go back. ⠀
We are already talking about a trip dedicated solely to biking! ⠀
Where are some of your favorite vacation spots in the mountains?! I’m taking ideas and also making a list of where we need to move so I can be in my dream environment 😂😂⠀

caption_std:
I was invited to my local Lululemon store at the Promenade at Chenal for a fit session and it was so much fun! There are so many super cute items in store right now, I had such a hard time picking!

Marissa and Allie were so fun and put together the cutest outfits. I loved them all. 🫶🏼

I ended up going with Fit No. 4:
⭐️ The SenseKnit Running Tank - it’s super supportive but not constrictive, it’s sweat wicking and quick drying and I couldn’t love this color more plus the cropped length.
⭐️ The Stretch High-Rise Jogger - as a busy mom always on the move, balancing kids and my real estate career plus trying to stay active, these are going to work for everything! They’re so comfortable and stretchy but I also plan to dress them up when need be. I’m also obsessed with the pockets!

Which fit would you most likely wear?

caption_std:
I don’t know about you, but I am looking forward to a new week! We are 7 days into the new year, and I am just now finalizing a new workout split that I’m going to be implementing this week. ⠀
I have indulged in my evening cravings and not followed my intermittent fasting schedule like I wanted to. Some might view that has a failure... right off the bat... starting off the new year *not so strong* 🤷‍♀️🤦‍♀️⠀
This is what I have learned over the last few years though: If you quit after you break a 3 or 4 day streak of working out/eating well, go back to your old habits and then wait around until the next big catalyst to come around and send you off on your health/fitness journey.... progress is going to be incredibly slow. ⠀
Every day, every meal, every workout... is a new opportunity to move in a healthier direction. I encourage you to not go all or nothing. Make those baby steps in the right direction because they add up to huge success over the long term.⠀
⠀
So whether or not you crushed every day so far of the new year, KEEP GOING this week!! Hit the reset button if you fell off track over the weekend. You haven’t failed and you don’t deserve to quit on yourself. YOU FREAKING GOT THIS!⠀
⠀
Who is ready to make progress this week? I would love to hear how your first week was- what went well for you? What do you want to change this week to make your routine more manageable?

caption_clean: Celebrating international women’s day the whole weekend. Started with barre in this beautiful place 🤎 #balinesski #barreworkout #poznań #godsavequeens #lululemonleggings

caption_std:
Yesterday afternoon, I convinced my hubby to join me on a mall excursion to complete my 9k steps target.  He needed to have his new pants hemmed at Lululemon anyway so we made it our first stop. (Tip:  Lululemon does free hemming on their products.)

If you’ve been following me for a while, you already know about my deep love for Lulu’s. I mean, who can resist their stylish activewear, especially when it’s on sale?😍

So while my hubby was trying on his pants for hemming, I went to my favorite section … the sale rack at the back.  #IYKYK  Lo and behold, I found these 3 adorable and colorful items that scream summer vibes. They compliment my skin tone perfectly, I had to make them mine. 🥰

With the sale rack successfully conquered, we proceeded with our mall expedition to weave through the busy corridors and reach our step goals. #keepwalking #stepcount 

Are you also a bargain hunter? What’s your favorite store? I would love to hear from you.

Happy Hump Day! 💕

xoxo,
Cathy

Would you return this bag or keep it?

caption_std:
Here’s my review of the Lululemon Fast and Free Hydration Vest!
.
Things I love:
- Super high quality material. Stretchy, lightweight, and forms to your body perfectly. Zero chafing!
- The straps actually go over my chest, rather than other vests where the straps sit outside of my boobs.
- Flattering!! It feels like it was made for a woman’s body, even though it is technically unisex
- Pockets! Lots of thoughtfully placed, easily accessible pockets
- Bungee closure system. Helps to provide support, and also feels nice and secure. Plenty of adjustability
- Machine washable! I’ve washed the vest a couple times and it retains its shape perfectly. It looks brand new after a wash! I wash it with my workout clothes, and tumble dry on low, if I don’t have time to hang dry it.
-Fast drying! I don’t feel like the vest retains sweat on the run at all, even though it is often damp when I take it off after a long run.
- The weight of anything in the pack is really well distributed, and never causes any strain on my neck or shoulders.
- PRICE!!! At $98 this vest is an absolute steal. I’ve paid nearly $200 for a vest that I like significantly less than I like this vest. At this price, I’m going to buy another one so that I have two to rotate!
.
Things I don’t love:
- The pocket for the bladder is smaller than I would like it to be.
- Doesn’t come with a bladder or flasks, so you’ll need to purchase your own
- Colors. They only offer two colors, black and purple. A wider range of colors would be nice.
.
This is part one of the review, and the subsequent parts will be listed in the comments! What other questions do you have?? Will you be purchasing?!
.
#lululemon #lululemonrunning #lululemonreview #fastandfree #womensrunningcommunity #thesweatlife #marathontraining #chicagomarathon #mychicagomarathon #chicagomarathontraining

This recent purchase is a winner!!! It’s the @lululemon Align Jogger Crop! It’s so soft, so flattering and so SO comfortable. I like having a lulu pant that is different from the traditional leggings because sometimes I don’t feel like wearing skintight leggings but still want the comfort. I find these slim and extremely flattering for a jogger type pant. The pockets are key and don’t bulk out like sometimes pockets do. I have worn these to lounge in, run errands, bike rides, dog walks....well, pretty much everywhere!! FYI..I sized up for a more loose fit. My favourite sports bras💛 

Finding a good bra can be so tricky...SO i’m sharing my go to’s with you from lowest to highest support (for my size) and the activity a recommend with it 🔥:

💪🏼 @aritzia TNALIGR Bra Top: Very light support, great for athleisure or stretching! 

💪🏼 @nike Light Support Padded Bra: Great for strength training days! 

💪🏼 @aloyoga Lavish Bra: Light Support: Love for yoga!

💪🏼 @lululemon Free to be Serene Bra: Light Support, perfect for yoga! *shop this at the link in my bio*

💪🏼 @lululemon Align Tank: Light Support, My go to for classic barre class! *shop this at the link in my bio*

💪🏼 @azurfit The Upgrade Barre: Medium- High Support- Obsessed for almost any type of workout! (Keeps those babies in, flattering low cut)

💪🏼 @fabletics Ella High Impact Sports Bra: High Support and high neck- Cardio days 💦 

Which one is your fav?!😘

caption_std:
Bjorn slept through the night last night! 💃🏼
.
However, my boobs did not, and I had to get up at 3:30am to pump. 😂 By the time I did that, I only had an hour before my alarm was set to go off. I tried to go back to sleep, but I wasn’t that tired, so I got up and went to the gym to do a treadmill workout and lift weights. 🏃🏼‍♀️🏋🏼‍♀️
.
I did an up-tempo workout of the following:
10 minutes @ 7:08 pace 
10 minutes @ 6:53 pace 
10 minutes @ 6:40 pace 
This went really well as I ran faster and for longer periods of time than the last two weeks. 🙌🏻
.
I featured this outfit on my Instagram stories and also wrote an entire blog post on all of my favorite lululemon pieces including my all-time favorite running tights, the cutest + fuctional sports bra, and the best athleisure leggings. ✨
.

caption_std:
*Tip for eating out and reaching your goals*⠀
⠀
Instead of thinking of going out to eat as a chance to order whatever you want and treat yourself... think of the treat being that you don’t have to grocery shop, prep, cook or clean the dishes for that meal 🙌🙌🙌⠀
Everything is prepared for you and you get a night off from making your own food, which I know I really appreciate!! So order something that you would eat at home, something with lots of veggies and protein instead of going all out and having a “treat meal”. ⠀
If you’re someone who loves to eat out a lot or travels frequently and is forced to eat at restaurants often... those meals will add up either in a positive or negative way. ⠀
Honestly, it’s about changing your mindset towards it. What’s your approach to eating out? How do you make it work while still reaching your goals? ⠀

caption_std:
The last clip is proof of why I do non-jumping sports 🙃

I am super stoked to review this @lululemon trail gear! #gifted Going to be honest, I thought lululemon gear was more about yoga and running than going for hikes, but after testing this gear for a couple of weeks, I am in love! 

The leggings feel super sturdy and the tshirt didn’t smell after two days on trail (honestly mind blowing cuz I am stinky). The trail shoes are grippy and don’t slip around on trails like normal sneakers. 

Outfit
✨Lululemon Cargo Super-High Rise Hiking Tight
✨Lululemon Swiftly Tech Short Sleeve Shirt
✨Lululemon Hood Lite Jacket
✨Lululemon Bliss Feel Trail Running Shoes
✨Lululemon Belt Bag (not gifted, I already owned this)

(For reference, I am wearing a size 10 in the tops and size 8 in the leggings)

While these products were gifted (with the exception of the belt bag), all opinions are my own! 

Would you ever go hiking in lululemon gear? Let me know!! 

#hikingclothes #hikinggear #lululemonreview

caption_std:
Lululemon Pants Review🌟

My first pair were the Wunder Under. And I have to say, they are the best leggings ever! They fit so nicely and are super comfy! Unfortunately, I believe they were discontinued, but they still have the same Wunder line, now Wunder Train. I would recommend them to everyone! I also have a pair in burgundy and love them as well! 

Next up are the Stretch High-Rise Jogger Full Length. The best pair of joggers by far!! You can dress them up or down. They’re my go to when traveling or running errands. I love the fabric and again, they fit incredible!!

Finally, the City Sleek Slim-Fit 5 Pocket High-Rise Pant. I was looking for black pants I could wear at work. I wanted to have the jean-like pants without having to worry they would fade, so I found these online. The fabric is great but unfortunately I didn’t love them. They fit nicely but the boot is a little too lose. If you like very-skinny pants, I don’t think this is the best option for you! 

If you get any of these, let me know how you like them! ✨

#lululemon #lululemonleggings #lululemonreview #joggers #lululemonpants

caption_std:
I rarely purchase @lululemon products for myself these days, not because I don’t LOVE their collection, I DO, but I am constantly spoiling my teenage daughter with gifts from their store. The amount of money we have spent on her over the past decade can be calculated by the obscene collection of mini bags that she has stashed in bins under her bed (shhhhh, don’t tell her dad!). Most of my #Lululemon items (seen in these pics) are all gifts from either my husband or daughter. 
My TRUE love language though, is finding high quality workout pieces that rival that of Lulu. Some may call it dupe, others call it a bargain. I like to call it saving for my daughter’s next #LululemonHaul or #GirlMath 
What do you think? Can you tell the difference between my Lululemon leggings and my Dupes? What about the actual Scuba and the #ScubaDupe ??? 

All the items are being linked in my @shopmy account. If I missed anything, just let me know.

label: Post 82
caption_clean: Look good feel good didn’t quite work the other day 🤣😭 @lululemon it’s rulu ribbed cropped half zip - I love this layering piece & wore it in my last half. Rulu material is warm, soft & great for colder months. Reflective details at the cuff, hand pockets (cuff flips over to mittens,) and a zippered front pocket. I should have went with my normal size rather than sizing up. Bicondo Amazon tank, dupe of fp movement. Thick and cute! @lululemon wunder train strappy bra @lululemon Align shorts in Vitapink. double lined. @saucony Endorphin speed 5- Ive only worn them a handful of times but I truly think my calves and shins are going to end up injured if I continue wearing these shoes. Crazy pain and knots throughout my calves from a lower drop than I’m used to & even though they’re so cute they are not working for me at all 💔 @lululemon fast and free running belt @feetures socks- ultra lite always #activewear #activewearreview #gymfit #runfit #lululemonreview

caption_std:
::
THREE THINGS THURSDAY
.
13th Edition 
.
Here are a few of my favorite things!

1. Mrs. Meyer’s Rain Water Hand Soap. I LOVE this fragrance!! To me, it’s what hand soap should smell like. It makes me SO happy every single time I wash my hands!

2. Lululemon InvisiWear Mid-Rise Thong. I know this is a little personal, but these panties from Lulu are INCREDIBLE. If you have a thong diversion, I would highly recommend giving these a try. I truly cannot feel them, plus absolutely ZERO panty lines!

3. Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask. My SIL gifted this to me and I LOVE IT! I keep it on my bedside table and apply a generous amount every night before I go to sleep. It feels AMAZING, smells great and leaves my lips feeling silky soft and smooth! It’s such a cute, little “sussy” gift! A small gift, given for no particular occasion other than love and friendship, usually not wrapped. My FAVORITE type of gift to give and receive! 

Products and websites linked in my stories for ya! And I don’t earn anything for sharing…just sharing the love! ☺️

Took my son to 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡 𝐍𝐞 𝐙𝐡𝐚 𝟐 𝐭𝐨𝐝𝐚𝐲, but guess what stole the show for me? 👀✨

The movie was packed with 𝐜𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐥 𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 and had a solid 𝟐𝐡𝐫 𝟑𝟎𝐦𝐢𝐧 𝐫𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞. Halfway through, I stepped out for a quick 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐛𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐤… and, well, couldn’t resist taking a full-body pic! 📸😂

Totally obsessed with my 𝐧𝐞𝐰 𝐋𝐮𝐥𝐮𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐧 𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐫𝐭—it’s so easy to style with anything in my wardrobe! Also, can we talk about how good I’m feeling lately? Been sticking to my TrimShake + beauty water (Nu Biome) combo, plus my weekly Zumba routine, and the results are showing! 🔥💃

𝐇𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐧 𝐚 “𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐜𝐤 𝐛𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐤” 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐧𝐚𝐩 𝐚 𝐩𝐢𝐜? 😆

caption_std:
::
THREE THINGS THURSDAY
.
14th Edition 
.
Here are a few of my favorite things!

1. Track That Mid-Rise Lined Short 5”. These Lulu shorts are the PERFECT LENGTH! I have some that are shorter and some that are longer, but I feel so comfortable (and appropriate as a 40 year old) in these! I highly recommend them if you’re in the market for some new athletic shorts for the summer months! 

2. Gripper Chopping Mats. I’ve always been a big fan of the plastic chopping mat versus a heavy wooden cutting board. I like to have multiple on hand when I’m cooking (one for meats, one for veggies, one for fruit), and I love that you can quickly wipe them clean or throw them in the dishwasher. Mine were worn out from years of use, so I recently purchased a new set from Target and I love them! They are sturdy (yet light weight), dishwasher safe (a must), and the gripper side is a game changer for keeping them in place while you’re busy chopping!

3. FASTer Way Cloth Resistance Band. This truly is one of my favorite pieces of equipment in my home gym, and it’s great for travel, too! It really does allow you to take your workout to the next level by increasing muscle resistance and intensity! I’m using it often in my workouts…and definitely FEELING the burn and SEEING the change! 

Products and websites linked in my stories for ya!☺️
.
.
.

caption_std:
::
THREE THINGS THURSDAY
.
105th Edition
.
Here are three of my favorite things! Comment “LINKS” and I’ll send you the links to shop my 3 favorites!

1. “Unreasonable Hospitality: The Remarkable Power of Giving People More Than They Expect” by Will Guidara. When Richie (from “The Bear”) reads a book in the best episode ever (Forks), I read the book! All kidding aside, this book truly is remarkable. Whether you’re a stay at home mom or running a Fortune 500 company, you need to read this one. It’s written from the perspective of the restaurant business, but it can be applied to any industry (or situation for that matter) that you’re in. I honestly can’t recommend it more! I enjoyed reading it so much, and finished it feeling inspired and challenged to give people more than they expect, especially my clients, strangers, and the people in my own home!

2. L’Oreal True Match Lumi Glotion. My mom gave this to my big girls for Easter and I love it so much I had to order my own bottle. It gives you the perfect healthy glow (with or without makeup). I especially love wearing it on the days I don’t wear makeup. I put it on after I apply my sunscreen and it leaves my face looking fresh, natural and glowy. Two thumbs up for this inexpensive drugstore product!

3. Lululemon Power Stride Tab Socks. Loving these socks from Lulu! They’re light weight (a must for me) and the heel tab is slightly higher than my Feetures socks, which I’ve needed lately for tennis. For some reason my Feetures where sliding down in my tennis shoes and causing me to get a blister on my heel. These Lulu socks stay in place, keep my feet nice and cool, and look cute, too (I love the neon colors).

Comment “LINKS” and I’ll send you the links to shop my 3 favorites!

.
.
.
.

caption_std:
💸 Стоят ли Lululemon $128 — или это просто красивая реклама?

Сегодня в тесте — легендарные леггинсы @lululemon Fast and Free High-Rise Tight в оттенке Desert Red.
Я носила их целую неделю — бегала 5K с собакой, гуляла, стирала, и проверяла всё, что важно для активных девушек;)

В этом обзоре ты узнаешь:

💦 Как они справляются с потом — видно ли мокрые следы после пробежки?
🏃🏻‍♀️ Посадка и комфорт — не сползают ли и удобно ли сидят на талии и бёдрах.
🤸🏻‍♀️ Эластичность и непрозрачность — тянутся ли и не просвечивают.
🌡️ Дышащая ткань — как быстро сохнут после бега.
🎒 Функциональность — карманы, швы, качество после стирок.

P.S. Все леггинсы покупаю за свои деньги — это честный обзор, без рекламы.

🧠🏃🏻‍♀️ PsyRun — метод, когда бег и психология работают вместе.
🎧 Аудиотренировки по ссылке в шапке профиля;)

caption_std:
the dual pouch wristelet from lululemon is soo popular so when they dropped it in my favor color combo, i had to get it!
 it comes with two pouches and a little strap! it’s perfect for quick errands where all you need are keys and a wallet! now i already have the belt bag and i will say that’s probably my absolute favorite item from lululemon! i carry all my essentials in it, from some meds to lipgloss, my wallet and even some snacks: it fits it all! so i was a little worried that i wouldn’t use this simply bc it doesn’t fit much. 
 however i’m pleasantly surprised by how much i’m reaching towards it in my day to day. i’ve attached a set of keys, along with another cute keychain—it’s my go to wallet/keychain now! 
 for $48, it’s quite pricey even more so than then belt bag, which i would say is probably the biggest downside of the product. in terms of functionality, it’s nowhernear as spacious as the belt bag. 
 final verdict: if you’re debating between this or the belt bag, buy the belt bag, it’s versatile and worth a bang for your buck. if you’re in the market for a compact cute and trendy wallet/ keychain, i would say this is perfect for you! 
rating: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

caption_std:
I wanted to share my experience with 𝐋𝐮𝐥𝐮𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐧’𝐬 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞, and honestly, I’m pretty impressed.

Lululemon’s Quality Promise is basically their commitment to product quality. If an item was 𝐩𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫 and doesn’t perform as intended—like 𝐩𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐮𝐟𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐝𝐞𝐟𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐬—they’ll work with you to make it right. You can bring the item into a lululemon store for in-person help, or submit a request online.

I had a Lululemon top that I bought 𝐥𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐧 𝐚 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐚𝐠𝐨, but recently it started 𝐩𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐭𝐞 𝐚 𝐛𝐢𝐭. At first, I hesitated because activewear naturally goes through wear and tear, but I remembered their Quality Promise and decided to give it a try.

The process was really straightforward:
• I submitted a request online, describing the issue and uploading photos and my receipt
• About 10 days later, Lululemon emailed me a 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧 𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐞𝐥
• I packed up the top and sent it back
• Once they received it, they issued me a 𝐠𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐟𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐚𝐦𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭 𝐈 𝐨𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐝

No back-and-forth, no arguing—everything was handled 𝐬𝐦𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐥𝐲 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐲 👍
Of course, it’s 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞 𝐛𝐲 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞, but my experience was very positive.

This really showed me that Lululemon’s “Quality Promise” isn’t just a nice slogan. Given their price point, knowing that they stand behind their products when something doesn’t perform as expected makes me feel much more confident buying from them.

👉 If you have Lululemon items that are 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐚 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐨𝐥𝐝 and are experiencing quality issues (pilling, loose threads, unusual loss of shape, etc.), it’s definitely worth reaching out and requesting support.

#lululemon #QualityPromise #lululemonreview #CustomerExperience

caption_std:
13 weeks postpartum and I finally wanted to wear something that showed my figure again not a legging, not a stiff jean. Something in between. 🤍
The Lululemon Easy Five Wide Leg in navy, size 31. Here’s my honest take on a midsize body.
✨ Mid rise feel even though it’s labeled low rise
✨ Enough compression without feeling constricted
✨ Can squat and play with my kids in them
✨ Straight to the office with a blazer
One thing to note — there is a back gap. Common on curvy bodies, not a dealbreaker, but worth knowing before you buy.
Full review with scores on the blog — link in bio 🔗
#lululemon #lululemonreview #lululemoneasyfive #midsize #postpartum

caption_std:
MY FIRST LULELEMON- AM I THE ONLY GUY THAT WEARS THIS ??! So- I’ve always admired the Lululemon brand loyalty and been amazed how much women pay for their stuff! Been told you cant beat the quality. 🙂

Well, my wifey turned my stereotype upside down 🙃 gifting me a Lulu shirt! I was like “They have men’s stuff?! (I is Ignorant I know)

And it turns out she got it gently used somewhere and didn’t pay like 75 bucks for it! Who knew ?! 

Thanks wifey for helping me overcome my stereotypes ! 😊

Im curious if other men wear Lululemon (hope i havent lost my man card) and if anyone else knows where to find their stuff cheap or at least affordable! 😂 

I have seen a few items at my local Goodwill and at Live Thankfully (which we love since sales benefit Immerse), but would welcome any other tips. 

Guess I’m in the club now !!! 🤔🙂

#lululemon
#lululemonhaul
#thriftfinds
#lululemoncreator

caption_std:
Lululemon Align Leggings: Worth the $100? Let's discuss 👖✨

I've owned 3 pairs for 2+ years. Here's my brutally honest review:

Swipe for the full breakdown →

THE GOOD:
✅ Buttery soft (seriously, like nothing else)
✅ No muffin top or digging in
✅ Flattering fit on most body types
✅ Stay opaque (no squat test fails!)
✅ Comfortable for all-day wear

THE BAD:
⚠️ $100+ per pair
⚠️ Pill easily with friction
⚠️ Not great for high-intensity workouts
⚠️ Delicate fabric (no rough surfaces!)

THE VERDICT: Worth it for yoga, lounging, everyday wear. NOT for running or CrossFit.

Cheaper alternatives: CRZ Yoga ($30), Colorfulkoala ($25) - similar feel, less durable.

💙 Save this if you've been debating!

Do you own Aligns? Team worth it or overhyped? 👇

#Lululemon #AlignLeggings #LululemonReview #Athleisure #Leggings #FashionReview #Activewear #RetailReviews

caption_std:
𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞 𝐜ủ𝐚 𝐋𝐮𝐥𝐮𝐥𝐞𝐦𝐨𝐧 giống như một 𝐥ờ𝐢 𝐜𝐚𝐦 𝐤ế𝐭 𝐯ề 𝐜𝐡ấ𝐭 𝐥ượ𝐧𝐠 𝐬ả𝐧 𝐩𝐡ẩ𝐦. Nếu món đồ bạn mua 𝐜𝐡ư𝐚 𝐭ớ𝐢 𝟏 𝐧ă𝐦 mà gặp các vấn đề như 𝐛𝐮𝐧𝐠 𝐜𝐡ỉ, 𝐱ù 𝐯ả𝐢 𝐡𝐨ặ𝐜 𝐡ư 𝐡ỏ𝐧𝐠 𝐝𝐨 𝐥ỗ𝐢 𝐬ả𝐧 𝐱𝐮ấ𝐭, họ sẽ hỗ trợ đổ𝐢 𝐦ớ𝐢 𝐡𝐨ặ𝐜 𝐡𝐨à𝐧 𝐥ạ𝐢 𝐠𝐢á 𝐭𝐫ị 𝐬ả𝐧 𝐩𝐡ẩ𝐦. Bạn có thể mang sản phẩm ra cửa hàng Lululemon để được hỗ trợ trực tiếp, hoặc submit yêu cầu online.

Mình có một chiếc áo Lululemon, mua chưa tới 1 năm nhưng dạo gần đây bị 𝐱ù 𝐯ả𝐢 𝐤𝐡á 𝐫õ. Ban đầu cũng hơi lăn tăn vì đồ thể thao mặc nhiều thì khó tránh khỏi hao mòn, nhưng nhớ ra Lululemon có chính sách 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞 nên mình thử submit online xem sao.

Quy trình khá đơn giản:
• Mình submit form online, mô tả tình trạng áo, upload hình và receipt
• Khoảng 𝟏𝟎 𝐧𝐠à𝐲 𝐬𝐚𝐮, Lululemon gửi 𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧 𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐞𝐥 qua email
• Mình chỉ cần đóng gói áo và gửi lại cho họ
• Sau khi họ 𝐧𝐡ậ𝐧 đượ𝐜 𝐬ả𝐧 𝐩𝐡ẩ𝐦, họ sẽ gửi cho mình 𝐠𝐢𝐟𝐭 𝐜𝐚𝐫𝐝 với 𝐠𝐢á 𝐭𝐫ị đú𝐧𝐠 𝐛ằ𝐧𝐠 𝐬ố 𝐭𝐢ề𝐧 𝐦ì𝐧𝐡 đã 𝐦𝐮𝐚 á𝐨 𝐛𝐚𝐧 đầ𝐮

Không cần tranh luận đúng sai, mọi thứ được xử lý k𝐡á 𝐧𝐡ẹ 𝐧𝐡à𝐧𝐠 𝐯à 𝐜𝐡𝐮𝐲ê𝐧 𝐧𝐠𝐡𝐢ệ𝐩 👍
Tất nhiên là 𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞-𝐛𝐲-𝐜𝐚𝐬𝐞, nhưng trải nghiệm cá nhân của mình là 𝐫ấ𝐭 ổ𝐧.

Thật sự thấy “𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞” không chỉ là slogan cho đẹp. Với mức giá của Lululemon, việc họ đứ𝐧𝐠 𝐫𝐚 𝐜𝐡ị𝐮 𝐭𝐫á𝐜𝐡 𝐧𝐡𝐢ệ𝐦 𝐤𝐡𝐢 𝐬ả𝐧 𝐩𝐡ẩ𝐦 𝐤𝐡ô𝐧𝐠 𝐜ò𝐧 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦 đú𝐧𝐠 𝐧𝐡ư 𝐤ỳ 𝐯ọ𝐧𝐠 khiến mình cảm thấy 𝐲ê𝐧 𝐭â𝐦 𝐡ơ𝐧 𝐫ấ𝐭 𝐧𝐡𝐢ề𝐮 khi mua đồ ở đây.

👉 Nên nếu bạn nào có đồ Lululemon 𝐜𝐡ư𝐚 𝐭ớ𝐢 𝟏 𝐧ă𝐦 mà gặp vấn đề về chất lượng (xù vải, bung chỉ, xuống form bất thường…), ccứ 𝐦ạ𝐧𝐡 𝐝ạ𝐧 𝐠ử𝐢 𝐲ê𝐮 𝐜ầ𝐮 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐨 𝐜𝐡í𝐧𝐡 𝐬á𝐜𝐡 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐞 nha.

Bought these one month postpartum and they’ve been on repeat ever since.
The Lululemon Daydrift Herringbone is a completely different feel from the regular Daydrift — softer, warmer, and the pattern does the work so you don’t have to think about it.
Super high waisted, well above the belly button. Not a figure-hugging fit, but that’s not what these are. They’re cool and put-together in a way that works for the office and works for a playdate without changing anything.
A fall/winter staple worth knowing about. Size L, I’m a 12-14 at 5’4”.

루루레몬의 표범 무늬 컬렉션은 양말, 액세서리, 속옷, 운동복, 재킷 등 77개 품목으로 구성되어 있으며, 모든 사람을 위한 제품을 포함하고 있다. 이 컬렉션은 다양한 스타일과 기능성을 제공하여 소비자들의 관심을 끌고 있다. 하버드 출신의 유명 셰프 비지하이 바르하니의 요리책 'Gursha: Timeless Recipes for Modern Kitchens'는 그녀의 독특한 유산을 기념하며, 100개 이상의 레시피를 통해 에티오피아, 이스라엘, 할렘의 문화와 전통을 소개한다. 이 책은 에티오피아 유대인 공동체의 요리 전통을 쉽게 따라 할 수 있도록 전달하고 있다.

제3의 빈은 에콰도르 초콜릿과 콜롬비아 커피로 만든 'Two Bean Bites'를 제공한다. 이 초콜릿은 부드럽고 고운 질감을 자랑하며, 월요일에는 두 개를 먹고 싶어질 정도로 맛있다. 매달 일본의 다양한 음식과 음료를 제공하는 도쿄트리트 스낵 박스는 일본 한정 키트캣 바, 스낵, 과자, 음료 등을 포함한 다양한 품목을 선보인다. 이 박스는 월별로 구독할 수 있으며, 분기별, 반기별 또는 연간 구독 시 할인된 가격으로 제공된다.

멕시코시티에 본사를 둔 Lørdag & Søndag는 다양한 재료로 아름다운 장식품과 기능적인 조각품을 제작한다. 이 회사의 창립자이자 형제인 살바도르와 엔조 콤파냐는 푸에블라에서 손으로 조각한 대리석 조각품을 디자인하였다. 각 작품은 색상, 질감, 자연적인 마킹의 차이로 인해 독특한 매력을 지닌다. 이 조각품은 다른 대리석 종류와 화산암으로도 제공된다. 높이는 약 30.5cm, 너비는 11.4cm이다.

Source: coolhunting.com

#BeejhayBarhany #Gursha #Lululemon #TokyoTreat

루루레몬의 표범 무늬 컬렉션은 양말과 액세서리, 다양한 속옷, 운동복, 재킷 등 총 77개의 아이템으로 구성되어 있으며, 모든 사람을 위한 제품을 포함하고 있다. 이 컬렉션은 패션과 기능성을 동시에 갖춘 제품들로, 소비자들에게 큰 인기를 끌고 있다.

하버의 유명 셰프 비지하이 바르하니가 저술한 'Gursha: Timeless Recipes for Modern Kitchens'는 에티오피아, 이스라엘, 할렘 등 그녀의 독특한 유산을 기념하는 요리책이다. 100개 이상의 레시피를 통해 그녀의 베타 이스라엘(에티오피아 유대인) 유산을 음식으로 생생하게 전달하며, 에티오피아, 수단, 이스라엘, 할렘에서의 가족의 경험을 이야기한다. 이 책은 상대적으로 작은 유대인 공동체의 요리 전통을 쉽게 따라 할 수 있는 방식으로 소개하고 있다.

커피와 초콜릿을 동시에 즐길 수 있는 완벽한 간식으로 Third Bean의 Two Bean Bites가 있다. 이 초콜릿은 에콰도르산 초콜릿 원두와 미세하게 갈은 콜롬비아 커피 원두로 만들어지며, 햇볕에 말리고 오크 통에서 숙성된다. 부드러운 식감이 특징이며, 한 개면 충분하지만 월요일에는 두 개를 먹고 싶을 수도 있다.

도쿄트리트 스낵 박스는 매달 일본의 다양한 음식과 음료 아이템을 선보이며, 일본 한정 키트캣 바, 스낵, 제과, 면, 사탕, 칩, 음료 등을 포함한다. 이 박스는 월별로 구독할 수 있으며, 분기별, 반기별 또는 연간 구독 시 할인된 가격으로 제공된다.

CDMX에 본사를 둔 Lørdag & Søndag는 다양한 재료로 아름다운 장식용 물건과 기능적인 조각을 제작한다. 이 회사의 창립자이자 형제인 살바도르와 엔조 콤파냐는 푸에블라에서 수작업으로 조각한 대리석 조각을 디자인하였다. 각 작품은 색상, 질감, 대리석의 자연적인 마킹에 따라 독특하며, 다른 대리석 종류와 화산암으로도 제공된다. 이 조각은 높이 약 30.5cm, 너비 약 11.4cm이다.

Source: coolhunting.com

♥️ Quand j’ai vu ces morceaux sur le site… je n’avais juste pas le choix de commander, tout était trop beau.

Les coupes sont incroyables, les tissus sont tellement confortables et honnêtement ce sont le genre de vêtements que tu mets une fois… et après tu veux les porter non-stop.

Et pour mes Lulu girls, je vous avertis tout de suite… ⚠️ les nouveautés et les grandeurs partent toujours très vite, donc si vous voyez un morceau que vous aimez… n’attendez pas trop !!!

🚨 J’ai inscrit mes grandeurs sur chaque photo dans la légende. Et si vous allez voir dans les commentaires, je vous ai aussi fait des petites vidéos pour vous montrer tous les détails des vêtements !!!

✨ P.S. Dites-moi en commentaire : quel est votre kit préféré ? Je suis curieuse de voir lequel vous aimez le plus ! 🙋🏻‍♀️
